goal:
Rename the project from gorechera to gorchera. This is a find-and-replace across the entire codebase:

1. In go.mod, change module name from "gorechera" to "gorchera"
2. In ALL .go files, replace import path "gorechera/" with "gorchera/" 
3. In ALL .go files, .md files, .json files, replace the string "gorechera" with "gorchera" and "Gorechera" with "Gorchera" (case-sensitive replacements)
4. Rename the .gorechera directory references in code to .gorchera (the state_store.go, artifact_store.go paths)
5. In CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, docs/*.md, README.md - replace all gorechera/Gorechera with gorchera/Gorchera
6. In .mcp.json, replace gorechera with gorchera
7. In cmd/gorechera/main.go path - note this is the filesystem path, just update string references inside the file

Do NOT rename actual directories on disk (like .gorechera/ or cmd/gorechera/) - only change the content of files.

Run go build ./... and go test ./... to verify after all replacements.

verification_contract.goal: Verify that the repository was renamed in-file from gorechera to gorchera across the defined text scope, without filesystem renames, and that the Go project still builds and tests successfully.
required_commands: rg -n "gorechera|Gorechera|gorechera/|\.gorechera" -g "*.go" -g "*.md" -g "*.json" go.mod README.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md docs .mcp.json cmd
required_checks: Confirm go.mod module line uses gorchera.
Confirm no .go file contains import path prefix gorechera/.
Confirm no in-scope .go/.md/.json content contains gorechera or Gorechera.
Confirm state/artifact store code now references .gorchera, not .gorechera.
Confirm cmd/gorechera/main.go still exists at the same filesystem path.
Confirm no directories or files were renamed on disk as part of the change.
disallowed_actions: Do not rename cmd/gorechera or any .gorechera directory on disk.
Do not change behavior beyond the textual project rename.
Do not ignore residual in-scope gorechera/Gorechera matches without documenting a justified exception.
verification_contract.notes: Verification should treat filesystem path names as intentionally unchanged; only file contents are in scope for renaming. Residual search results must be reviewed to distinguish content from unchanged path names shown by tooling.

summary: All sprint and verification requirements are satisfied; ready for evaluator gate and completion.
leader_context_summary: The job state includes an implement step with status="succeeded" that covers the rename goal and reports successful verification via residual search, go build, and go test.

steps.task_text: Perform the repo-wide in-file rename from `gorechera` to `gorchera` in `D:\News\Business\AIOrchestrator` with no filesystem renames. Update `go.mod` module path to `gorchera`. In all `.go` files replace import prefix `gorechera/` -> `gorchera/`. In all `.go`, `.md`, and `.json` files replace case-sensitive `gorechera` -> `gorchera` and `Gorechera` -> `Gorchera`. Update code references from `.gorechera` to `.gorchera` where they are content references, especially in state/artifact store code. Update `CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `README.md`, `docs/*.md`, `.mcp.json`, and content inside `cmd/gorechera/main.go`. Do NOT rename any directories or files on disk, including `cmd/gorechera` and any real `.gorechera` directory. After edits, run verification commands: `rg -n "gorechera|Gorechera|gorechera/|\.gorechera" -g "*.go" -g "*.md" -g "*.json" go.mod README.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md docs .mcp.json cmd`, `go build ./...`, and `go test ./...`. Review residual search hits carefully and distinguish unchanged filesystem path names in tool output from in-file content. Return a concise summary of changed files and verification results.
steps.summary: Completed the in-file rename from `gorechera` to `gorchera` across the requested scope. Updated `go.mod` module path, all affected Go import paths and string literals, Markdown/JSON references in the requested files, MCP/tool names, and `.gorechera` content references in code such as `cmd/gorechera/main.go`. No directories or files were renamed on disk; `cmd/gorechera/main.go` still exists. Verification passed: `rg -n "gorechera|Gorechera|gorechera/|\.gorechera" -g "*.go" -g "*.md" -g "*.json" go.mod README.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md docs .mcp.json cmd` returned no matches, `go build ./...` succeeded, and `go test ./...` succeeded. Non-fatal errors encountered during execution: an initial bulk-replacement script mishandled `.mcp.json` path trimming and was corrected; an earlier login-shell invocation surfaced a PowerShell profile execution-policy warning, so verification was rerun with `-NoProfile`/non-login execution.
